narrative:
12 Ohio House district has 75,172 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -10.4% D−R vs -26.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
